text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Twinkle Series now behind us, things
have started to settle down. One day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And this is the pool! Isn't it huge?!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has been tasked with guiding
prospective students around during the
academy's open campus.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Geez, youngins everywhere you look.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! I'm gonna put them through the ringer
next year!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize you were one of the open campus
organizers, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm not, actually! The director just asked me to
help out! Ehe!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
A direct request from Director Akikawa? That's
quite uncommon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well, ummm...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser is a big inspiration for us, so the
director wanted to give us the chance to meet her
in person!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
One thing led to another, and now she's showing
us around campus!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yup! She's just as friendly and approachable as
she seems on TV... It's like a dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
She was so cool in the Arima Kinen! We all want
to be just like her!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Haha, looks like someone's got her own fan club.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate it, but I think it'd be better if you
looked up to someone more special.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's loads of talented racers here that are way
more impressive than I am.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Once you enroll here, you'll see what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: No thanks. I'm happy with you, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
I want to be someone who's friendly and who
inspires courage in others—just like you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Even the director said that you're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...You mean it? Well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I'm really happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ah, there she is! Hey, Director!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I just thought I'd let you know that I finished the
tour!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I heard! You have my gratitude! Everyone was
thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It was nothing. If anything, they were the ones
who made my day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But um... there's something I've been wanting to
ask you. It's been bothering me for a while, to be
honest.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Why have you been so interested in me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten used to it now, but the director
occasionally shows up to encourage
Matikanetannhauser and tell her she expects a lot
from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's held Matikanetannhauser in high regard for
a long time now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I get that you want to encourage an ordinary
Umamusume like me, but still...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I see... I was concerned that it would place
unnecessary pressure on you if I went into too
much detail!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I remained vague. However, now that
you've grown so much, I believe the time is right
for me to reveal the truth!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Our academy is filled with countless talented
Umamusume! We're well known for our rigorous
enrollment process!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, no matter your skills, there is always
someone better!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Behind every victor who claims glory lie the
defeated, tormented by a sense of powerlessness!
Because of that...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Many racers become convinced their skills are
simply ordinary! Eventually, their performance
declines, and they lose hope for the future!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The fault falls on no one! Yet, as director of this
academy, it rends my heart asunder!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: But then there's you! You alone!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You believe yourself ordinary, yet your skills
don't regress. Even when you are beaten down by
the ultra-talented, you bounce back with aplomb!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That is why I placed my hopes on you! I wanted
you to become a lodestar for all those
Umamusume who label themselves as ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And you've lived up to my expectations
spectacularly!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you must have felt it yourself during the
open campus today! There are many who aspire
to be like you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you don't mean... That's why you asked me
to guide them around?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Though again, it is not because I wanted
to pressure you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I simply wish for you to continue racing in your
perfectly ordinary, carefree way—just as you've
done until now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I didn't expect the director to get that
fired up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? Having others believe in you
doesn't feel so bad.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who came to the open campus
were all so bright and cheerful...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It makes me want to live up to their expectations.
So... let's do our best together, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now that that's settled, it's time to train!
Which reminds me, I reworked my schedule last
night!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Tell me what you think!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hands me her notebook
which, as usual, is filled margin to margin with her
training plan.
choice_data_list: Isn't this working a little too hard?
Isn't this working a little too hard?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! This is totally
normal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is the same as ever, and it
doesn't look like our time together will be ending
any time soon.
